name: Golden Buck
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the cheddar cheese and butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add half the Colt 45 malt liquor to the mixture when the cheese is partly melted. Cook while stirring constantly.
3. Combine the remaining Colt 45 malt liquor with the egg yolk that has been slightly beaten, then add it slowly to the mixture while stirring continuously until smooth and thick.
4. Serve on hot toast and sprinkle with cayenne pepper. Feel free to substitute your favorite brew.
